label: Source grounding
description: Responses must cite approved sources before they are shown to the user.
evidence: Current answer contains linked source cards with freshness metadata.

label: Privacy mode
description: Sensitive session context is minimized and protected before any answer leaves the orchestration layer.
evidence: PII-sensitive fields are masked before logging or escalation.

label: Human review escalation
description: Low-confidence or sensitive intents can be routed to a specialist without losing context.
evidence: Confidence thresholds are tied to escalation playbooks and live-agent routing.

label: Policy checks
description: Every answer is checked against deployment policy, product rules, and industry controls.
evidence: The current answer passed residency and content policy gates.

label: Audit logging
description: Prompt, source, model route, and output evidence are captured for traceability.
evidence: A structured answer trace is available for the active response.

label: Regional deployment
description: The current deployment profile routes workloads through approved EU infrastructure.
evidence: Gateway policy is locked to EU-resident retrieval and model services.

label: Content safety filters
description: Unsafe or unsupported requests are filtered before an answer is composed.
evidence: Risk classifiers and prompt shields are enforced at request time.

label: PII protection
description: Personal data is redacted or minimized before model processing and storage.
evidence: Masking and retention controls are enabled inline for sensitive entities.

label: Response traceability
description: Every answer can be traced back to the system components and evidence used to create it.
evidence: The architecture trace view maps answer generation to platform layers.
